title: Walk-in Drive Financial Analyst at FreeCharge Advisory Limited

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Financial Analyst at FreeCharge Advisory Limited
jsonLd.description:
FreeCharge Advisory Limited is actively seeking a talented and motivated Financial Analyst to join our dynamic team in Raipur. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About FreeCharge Advisory Limited:
FreeCharge Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Income Tax

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with FreeCharge Advisory Limited!
